typography.pairing_strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist' approach for Arabic: One font family with radical weight contrast (Bold/Black for prominent headings, Light for body text). Do not use generic Cairo font. Use IBM Plex Sans Arabic.

spacing_and_layout.general: Mobile-first approach. Uses a clean bento grid for categories on the home page. RTL (Right-to-Left) direction is MANDATORY.
spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-background relative pb-20 overflow-x-hidden border-x border-border/30
spacing_and_layout.cards: bg-white border border-border/60 rounded-2xl p-4 transition-all

bottom_navigation.description: Sticky bottom bar at z-50. bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-border/40. Icons for Home, Search, Add (+), Chat, Profile. Floating action button in the center for 'Add Listing'.

listing_card.description: Vertical card. Image on top (aspect-[4/3], object-cover, rounded-xl), title below, price in primary color, location in subtle text. Very subtle borders.

product_detail.description: Full width image carousel on top. Details below. Sticky bottom bar with 'Chat' (Secondary Color) and 'WhatsApp' (Green) buttons.

category_bento.description: Grid layout (grid-cols-3 or grid-cols-4) with lucide icons and text. Very clean, no background (or subtle subtle background), circular icon wrappers.

search_bar.description: Large, pill-shaped search input at the top of the home screen. bg-white shadow-sm border border-border/50.

icons.usage: Use icons for categories and bottom nav. Ensure directionality makes sense for RTL (e.g., ChevronRight becomes back button in RTL).

critical_rules: RTL Layout (Right-to-Left) is MANDATORY. Ensure `dir='rtl'` is added to the HTML/Body element.
Do NOT use typical boilerplate colors. Stick strictly to the Desert Industrial palette.
Mobile-first: The design MUST look like a native mobile app. Use a constrained max-width (e.g., `max-w-md mx-auto`) to simulate a mobile app frame.
Include `data-testid` on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
